arts.ttl: What Chelsea have already said about Josh Acheampong amid contract stand-off
arts.sum: Chelsea sporting directors Paul Winstanley and Laurence Stewart reiterated their commitment to the club's academy only a week before banishing Josh Acheampong from playing for the first team or the development squad. Stewart then emphasised: "There's nothing we want more than players coming through the academy, through the system and playing in the first team.

arts.ttl: Maresca unsure if Mudryk can cut it at Chelsea
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has admitted that Mykhailo Mudryk's omission against Liverpool was a 'technical decision' and urged him to step up his game. The winger's chances have gradually been diminishing under Maresca and he was completely omitted at the weekend in the crunch clash with Liverpool at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Chelsea chief joins Glazer family in £650m bidding race amid Blues 'civil war'
arts.sum: A Chelsea director and the Glazer family are among the parties interested in acquiring one of the Hundred cricket teams, with bids for the franchises exceeding £650million

arts.ttl: Panathinaikos vs Chelsea preview: Felix says star sign can help his game time
arts.sum: Joao Felix promised to live up to his "competitive" Scorpio star sign and not to stop battling to force his way into head coach Enzo Maresca's plans following his return to Chelsea . "It's a competitive sign," he said.

arts.ttl: Chelsea director 'makes £650m takeover decision' amid interest from The Glazers
arts.sum: Goldstein, meanwhile, registered interest with the Raine Group as part of a potential offer which is independent from Chelsea. However, the largest known offer is reported to have come from Sanjiv Goenka, the Indian billionaire and entrepreneur who also owns IPL franchise Lucknow Super Giants.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix will not stop working to secure regular Chelsea starting spot
arts.sum: The Portugal international is in his second spell at Stamford Bridge after signing from Atletico Madrid in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea looking at Champions League man tipped to become ‘one of the best defenders in the world’ - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea are now being linked with a highly-rated defender who’s playing in the Champions League competition this season. In fairness, the Chelsea squad does include...

arts.ttl: €100m Chelsea target could be set to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah’s future at Liverpool remains up in the air and should the superstar leave Anfield, the Reds have Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens in mind to replace the Egypt captain. The 32-year-old is out of contract at the end of the season and there has been no news on the Merseyside club being close to […] The post €100m Chelsea target could be set to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea will visit a stadium in mourning when they take on Panathinaikos in the UEFA Conference League... with Greek side set to host their first match since the death of George Baldock
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL IN ATHENS: Baldock's death shocked not only his team-mates but the city of Athens, with Maresca realising his team will need to handle an emotionally charged Conference League clash.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca can't hide true feelings after Chelsea youngster is brutally frozen out
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has broken his silence on the contract row that has led to academy graduate Josh Acheampong being frozen out of the Italian's team
